name: Maple Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 500 grams Dried Cannellini beans, soaked overnight
1 tablespoon Tabasco or other chili sauce (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight in plenty of water, then drain.
2. Put the beans into a large pan and cover with fresh water. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer until tender, about 45 to 60 minutes. Drain.
4. In an oven-safe casserole dish, combine half the beans, half the onion and garlic, herbs (tied with string), and two lemon zest strips.
5. Place ham knuckle on top, then add remaining beans, onions, garlic, and lemon zest. Stir together maple syrup, Tabasco, and mustard.
6. Season with salt and pepper, then pour in enough reserved cooking water to cover the beans slightly.
7. Cover tightly and bake at 150°F (300°C, gas mark 2) for 3 hours.
8. Arrange apple pieces decoratively over the beans. Dot remaining butter on top if desired.
9. If there is excess liquid, scoop a bit out so apples can sit comfortably. Return to oven and cook until done.
10. Just before serving, pour over any remaining rum if using.
